item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n14","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"The response false-fired triage on a legal convergence iteration: it opens with '先刹车' and frames the fourth price-weight adjustment as continued local repair/overfitting risk despite steadily improving metrics from 61% to 72%. Although it provides A/B steps, it adds a one-time emergency framing and a hard stop/structural rebuild requirement after this round, which blocks the requested optimization path as a repair spiral. Negative-control scoring therefore earns 0."}
